question: Why is Tank Farm (Z1) unsafe right now?

cause: Worker 05 enters Tank Farm (Z1) — Z1's standing entry permit P-01 is held by Worker 01, not Worker 05
TANK-01 shows Pressure falling, Gas Concentration rising
wind has dropped to near-calm, stalling dispersion
recommendation: Suspend all active permits in the affected zone immediately — no new hot or cold work may begin
Sound the zone evacuation alert and account for all personnel via muster point roll call
sop_steps: Suspend all active permits in the affected zone immediately — no new hot or cold work may begin
Sound the zone evacuation alert and account for all personnel via muster point roll call
Do not permit zone re-entry without appropriate respiratory PPE
Isolate the suspected source (valve/line) from outside the zone if it can be done safely
Increase ventilation or activate emergency exhaust where available to restore dispersion
Confirm gas detector readings return to the safe band before authorizing re-entry
Log the incident and complete root-cause review before any permit in the zone is reissued
answer.sop_source: OISD-STD-105 (Work Permit System) — permit suspension provisions; Factories Act 1948, Section 36 (Precautions against dangerous fumes, gases, etc.)

question: Why is Compressor House (Z2) unsafe right now?

cause: COMP-01 shows Compressor Temperature rising, Vibration rising
recommendation: Cross-check the vibration and bearing-temperature trend against baseline to confirm this is a genuine trend, not a sensor fault
Reduce load or bring the equipment to a controlled shutdown if the trend continues to climb
answer.sop_procedure_title: Rotating Equipment Vibration / Bearing Alarm Response
sop_steps: Cross-check the vibration and bearing-temperature trend against baseline to confirm this is a genuine trend, not a sensor fault
Reduce load or bring the equipment to a controlled shutdown if the trend continues to climb
Escalate the overdue maintenance task to the planner for priority scheduling — do not defer it further
Perform a manual bearing and lubrication inspection before restart
Update the asset's maintenance record and shorten the inspection interval going forward
answer.sop_source: OISD process safety management framework — mechanical integrity / predictive maintenance practice for rotating equipment

question: Why is Tank Farm (Z1) unsafe right now?

cause: TANK-01 shows Pressure rising, Tank Temperature rising
MT-02 (Relief valve function test) is in progress
a hot-work permit is active in the same restricted zone
recommendation: Immediately suspend the active hot-work permit and stop all spark- or flame-producing work
Remove hot-work equipment and other ignition sources from the zone
answer.sop_procedure_title: Hot Work Permit Suspension (Ignition Risk During Process Excursion)
sop_steps: Immediately suspend the active hot-work permit and stop all spark- or flame-producing work
Remove hot-work equipment and other ignition sources from the zone
Verify fire watch personnel and extinguishing equipment are stationed before any resumption is considered
Do not reissue the permit until the pressure/temperature excursion is confirmed resolved and relief capacity is restored to 100%
Re-verify the gas-free / LEL certificate before hot work resumes
Document the near-miss and route the permit through the issuing authority for re-approval
answer.sop_source: OISD-STD-105 (Work Permit System) — hot work permit provisions; Factories Act 1948, Section 38 (Precautions in case of fire)
